LanguageData.AmbrosiaAddiction.description: A chemical addiction to punga fruit. Long-term use has caused neurological changes, making it hard to function without the fruit. Withdrawal is tough, but with time, the body can recover.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaAddiction.label: punga addiction
LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.description: Punga chemicals in the bloodstream. It lifts the mood and helps survivors forget the harshness of the wasteland.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaHigh.label: punga warmth
LanguageData.AmbrosiaTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to punga fruit. The more severe this tolerance is, the more punga it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.AmbrosiaTolerance.label: punga tolerance
